reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this game. This is a great concept! Very easy to understand. I will be playing this game again. I felt like I was on an adventure playing this game!
Im mad because i was looking forward to playin this on my Samsung s6 but every time it trys to install the app. It says install failed or download failed

This game looks like it could be fun but, whenever I go to options and select controller the game starts spinning and spinning. I've tried to restart the game to maybe fix it numerous times to no avail. Uninstalled the game. Maybe it will get fixed and I would try again.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for your feedback and sorry you experienced the difficulty. We will look into the reported problem. Meanwhile, if you use your controller when you are in the Oculus Store and then start the game, the game should detect your controller automatically, so you won't need to go to the Settings to select the controller. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: Maze games Without controlller support are sh1t
Nothing complicated here just a nice and relaxing maze casual game ! Nothing special but I think it worth the fun ! Can’t understand the hate because the game is not free 100 percent

Sorry I purchased this. Wasted my money. Not much going on in this game except mazes all alike except texture and color changes. Not sure what what I was expecting but I should have realized it would  be endless mazes from the name of the game.  My mistake.        Update: 
 I can see that someone who enjoys  mazes could  have fun playing this game. I shouldn't  blame  the game for my lack of enthusiasm  of mazes. Just a bad decision on part. If you like mazes, you might like this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. 
It is normal for different gamers to like different game genres and feel differently about a game. During our testing period, the initial reaction of many testers was screaming out of excitement.
That being said this game is well-suited for players who love pathfinding and exploration, so if you like memorizing the maps and finding directions, or you want to improve those skills, you might love this game. We have tried to be as clear as possible in the game title and description what the game is about and we have added video and screenshots for further clarification.
Also mazes are not similar. They have very different environments and very different difficulty. We believe the game is an exciting and unique VR experience but it is just not for everyone.

reviews.review_description: It is very enjoyfull maze, some is easy and some is more hard I like simple control way
A pretty good VR maze app.  The grapgic is beautiful, the control easy and the maze is  challenge. I feel it relax and enjoy to play the game.
By RiseAngle. Virtual maze game. TRT 5 min demo.
It won’t open anymore.
Missing the wow factor, would be better if you could freeroam instead of looking at arrows to move, would feel more real, good game though �
Does this work with a controller, because mine is not working in this game?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. The game has simple controls and works with a controller. Just find the basic select button on your controller (usually "A" or "X") and use it to navigate toward waypoints. That's all you will need for playing the game.

reviews.review_description: The walls are very detail and the skies are beautiful that you might want to stay in the mazes instead of trying to escape.
But i think the dev should update and improve the graphics and details some more and maybe add stuff going on like thunder and lightning, strange sounds and creepy voices.
Wont open

reviews.review_title: Fun little game with some small issues.
reviews.review_description:
So I will say up front I bought the full levels in this game. I figured for $2 if I got even a hour of enjoyment from it I would be happy. I got a little less than that but overall am still happy. The mazes start easy but do get challenging to a degree as they go on. Some of the locations look really cool and that was fun on its own.

Issues though are the game sometimes leaves on its own or selects a level on its own. And the big one the controls at times get stuck stopping you from moving. I found closing the game and reopening it worked to fix it but I had to do every few levels which was a pain.

All in all it’s a good game, I think $2 may be a little high though for what it is. I think the price should be lowered to $1 and then I’d for sure recommend it as a buy
It keeps telling me to update my oculus app that is already up to date.....

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for letting us know about this issue! We have communicated the issue to Oculus, as it would be a problem on their end not ours, and they would be the one able to fix it. As far as we have been notified, the problem should have been fixed. Would you please check and let us know if it's been fixed? If yes, would you please update your review? If no, would you please provide more information?

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately not working properly. Controls need a fix.
I've done a lot of mazes. This is entirely too easy.
A game where i can finally walk and not stand still in one locatoin (wich is boring ) now i can walk around ,get lost and have fun. Thx ^^
